_comment: 21 hooks for clip_005 — round-robin slice of the 144-hook library from clip_001.
hooks:
One question. What part of me
would ruin your focus first?

Im so tired I need
some shoulder to put my legs on

don't just stare
say hi then

would you walk up to me
or just look?

i don't argue
i just use my other lips

if you saw me irl
would you say something or freeze

you can't be older than 25
if you don't understand this reference:

i hate waterlemons 🍉
you read that wrong.
you read that wrong too.
send this to someone you have a crush on

Imagine I invite you to my room
while everyone's distracted
at Christmas dinner...
what do you do?

I want you to yuwef me
but replace:
u with o
w with u
y with p
e with n
f with d

I'm not everyone's type.
just the dangerous ones

pov: it's 2am and I just texted you
"you up?"

hold my hand in public
or pretend you don't know me?

my face says innocent.
my thoughts disagree.

the letters A, S, S are hiding
in mASSage.
you're welcome.

segments.text:
here's a list of the top 5
worst guy names 🤮...
Arthur TV is actually my twin
